title: Wire Dashboard route + sidebar nav
description: Add /dashboard route (landing) and sidebar nav link; open recent news item externally. Acceptance: dashboard reachable, quick actions functional, type-check + lint pass.

title: Dashboard: Article Collection section
description: 14-day bar chart of collected articles with today/this-week headline numbers, most recent items, and breakdowns by source_name, source_type, sync_state. Acceptance: chart + headlines + recent list + three breakdowns render accurately.

title: Dashboard: metrics row
description: Top metrics row showing producing vs silent sources, items collected today and this week. Acceptance: four stat cards render accurate numbers from data contract.

title: Dashboard: Source Health section
description: List each source_name with producing/silent status, article count, last-collected date; silent/at-risk flagged first; filter by state; open a source's collected items. Acceptance: sources sorted silent-first, filter works, drill-down lists items.

title: News Item data model + metrics lib
description: Add typed NewsItem normalizer and pure metrics functions (today/week/total counts, 14-day trend, breakdowns by source_name/source_type/sync_state, derived source health with producing/silent 48h rule). Acceptance: unit-tested pure functions computing all spec metrics accurately.
